title: Just Golden Berries
description: Adds new food to minecraft — golden berries.
body:
### Description
This mod just adds new food — golden berries — and nothing more. Golden berries are slightly more useful than sweet berries because they give player *4 points of food* and *3.6 points of food saturation*.
### Craft
Gold berries craft is similar to golden carrot, but you need to use sweet berries instead of a carrot.
![Craft image](https://github.com/Nedelis/golden-berries-mod/blob/master/golden_berries_craft.png?raw=true)
